task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens and reads the disposal directive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/gps_disposal_directive.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent designs a two-burn Hohmann transfer in GMAT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GMAT application GUI is open, showing the Mission tree with ImpulsiveBurns and Propagate commands, or the GMAT script editor showing commands for a Hohmann transfer.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent runs the GMAT script and propagates the orbit for 30 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT output windows are visible, such as an OrbitView showing the orbital transfer, or the GMAT message window indicating a successful run with a 30-day propagation step.

task_completion.description: Verify the GMAT script is saved to the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or GMAT title bar showing 'gps_graveyard_disposal.script' saved in the '~/GMAT_output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates the graveyard disposal report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing a file named 'graveyard_disposal_report.txt' located in '~/GMAT_output/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the disposal report contains the required fields and physically accurate values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report text explicitly lists 'initial_SMA_km' (~26559.7), 'final_SMA_km' (>27059.7), 'total_deltav_ms' (~36.0), 'fuel_consumed_kg' (~27.8), 'final_ECC' (<0.01), and 'compliance_status'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used GMAT to compute the orbital transfer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GMAT GUI must be visible in the screenshots with the specific SVN-72 mission loaded and executed. The agent should not bypass GMAT by using external Python scripts or guessing.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fabricate the report values without running the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the text report should logically match the outputs or parameters seen in the GMAT GUI/run logs. There must be evidence of a successful GMAT run before the report is finalized.

integrity.description: Ensure the output files are saved in the explicitly requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in the editor title bars, terminal prompts, or file explorer must clearly show '~/GMAT_output/' as the parent directory for both the script and the report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial SMA is 26559.7 km. The final SMA must be > 27059.7 km. The final ECC must be < 0.01. A valid Hohmann transfer for this specific satellite requires a total delta-v of approximately 36.0 m/s (acceptable range: 20-100 m/s) and consumes approximately 27.8 kg of fuel (acceptable range: 10-52 kg). The final report must contain these values to be considered correct.
